manifests.null_hypothesis: No shared latent component yields neither context-adjusted subspace recovery nor relative pairwise-distance geometry above its declared null.
manifests.claim_boundary: Synthetic identification and error-calibration result only; no human or psychological claim.

reference_population.sampling_frame: deterministic fresh PANDORA authors after prior V7 exclusions

occasion_definition.replication_rule: source and time disjoint blocks per author
occasion_definition.source_provenance: source rows retained before operator construction

manifests.null_hypothesis: Own-versus-stranger alignment after source/time separation is no greater than a shuffled author-pairing family.
manifests.claim_boundary: Technical within-PANDORA geometry only; no personality, causal-context, or cross-domain claim.

reference_population.sampling_frame: deterministic fresh PANDORA authors after E0--E4 and W3 exclusions

occasion_definition.unit: one common capped source-comment panel transformed by five registered operators
occasion_definition.source_provenance: source rows retained before representation fitting and operator construction

manifests.null_hypothesis: A registered shared-subspace method does not exceed its broken-correspondence training null under the frozen author split.

decision_rule.multiplicity: registered method family with rank capacity selected on calibration and a synchronized broken-correspondence max-T family
decision_rule.rank_boundary: transport capacity is not factor count; use a separate effective-rank diagnostic if the grid boundary is reached

manifests.claim_boundary: Compares mathematical representations only; it cannot identify a finite factor count, named axis, psychological construct, or method winner without paired superiority inference.

occasion_definition.replication_rule: at least two independent sessions per participant-condition
occasion_definition.source_provenance: session, prompt, operator and scorer hashes recorded

manifests.null_hypothesis: No person-specific response contrast is recoverable beyond design error.
manifests.claim_boundary: A future design declaration, not a result from existing natural text.
